chapter_title.en: HADEETH ABOUT THE PEOPLE ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 21)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 21)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ خَالِطُوا النَّاسَ فَإِنَّهُ إِنْ لَمْ يَنْفَعْكُمْ حُبُّ عَلِيٍّ وَ فَاطِمَةَ (عليها السلام) فِي السِّرِّ لَمْ يَنْفَعْكُمْ فِي الْعَلَانِيَةِ.

en.hubeali: H 14603 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Saleh Bin Al-Sindy, from Ja’far Bin Basheer, from Anbasat, who has narrated the following:
Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I hear himasws saying: ‘Intermingle with the people, for if the love for Aliasws and Fatimaasws does not benefit you in the privacy, it will not benefit you publicly’.
en.sarwar: 155. Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Saleh Bin Al-Sindy, from Ja’far Bin Basheer, from Anbasat, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.), said, ‘I hear him (a.s.) saying: ‘Intermingle with the people, for if the love for Ali (a.s.) and Fatima (a.s.) does not benefit you in the privacy, it will not benefit you publicly’.
